title: Proposal for Velara Bioworks Private Limited
opening_paragraph: At Accio Legal, we understand that for a high-growth synthetic biology company such as Velara Bioworks — a Bangalore-based enzyme platform business now preparing for its Series A — a clean, compliant, and strategically aligned equity structure is non-negotiable. Pursuant to our recent discussions, we have identified four distinct workstreams in Velara's current shareholding framework that require execution before institutional diligence: a pending allotment that has not been formalized, an angel exit that needs cash settlement, an ESOP that needs to be put on a proper legal footing, and a founder shareholding position that needs to be restored above the 60% combined threshold post-ESOP.
approach_bullets: Regularize the pending share allotment from September 2025 under the private placement framework
Structure a Section 68 buyback for Mr. Desai's clean cash exit
Draft and implement an 8% ESOP plan with full board and statutory backing
Optimize founder shareholding to maintain combined promoter control above 60% post-ESOP
Position the cap table to be diligence-ready for the upcoming Series A round
scope_section_title: Scope of Services — Cap Table Cleanup, ESOP Implementation & Founder Control Optimization
scope_section_intro: We propose to undertake the following four-phase mandate, sequenced to address compliance gaps first, then exit and incentive structuring, and finally founder optimization in light of the resulting cap table.

phases.name: Phase I: Regularization of Pending Share Allotment
phases.framing_sentence: Accio Legal will ensure that the pending allotment of shares — for which ₹45 lakhs in consideration was received in September 2025 — is completed in compliance with applicable laws and the Registrar's filing requirements.
scope_bullets: Review of transaction structure and applicable provisions under the Companies Act, 2013
Structuring of allotment under the private placement framework
Drafting of Board Resolutions, allotment documentation, and share certificates
Filing of PAS-3 with the Registrar of Companies
outcome_bullets: Legally compliant and fully documented share allotment
Elimination of regulatory exposure arising from the delayed issuance

phases.name: Phase II: Buyback Structuring (Mr. Desai's Exit)
phases.framing_sentence: Accio Legal will structure a clean cash exit for Mr. Desai by way of a buyback under Section 68 of the Companies Act, 2013, executed via the board approval route given that the buyback falls within the 10% threshold.
scope_bullets: Structuring buyback under Section 68 of the Companies Act, 2013, via the board approval route
Assessment of free reserves availability and confirmation of the 10% threshold compliance
Drafting of buyback offer documents and board resolutions
outcome_bullets: Clean cash exit for Mr. Desai without dilution to remaining shareholders
Increase in promoter shareholding consistent with the founder optimization objective in Phase IV

phases.name: Phase III: ESOP Plan & Implementation
phases.framing_sentence: Accio Legal will draft and put in place a comprehensive 8% ESOP plan covering the first cohort of approximately twelve grantees, with the legal architecture and operational tooling to scale further as Velara grows.
scope_bullets: Drafting of ESOP plan covering eligibility, vesting, exercise price, plan administration, and treatment on termination
Letter of Grant template covering options granted, exercise price, vesting schedule, expiration, and other key terms
Drafting of board and shareholder resolutions for plan approval and grant of options
MGT-14 filing for the special resolution
Tracking spreadsheet for grant, vesting, and exercise
outcome_bullets: Investor-grade ESOP framework aligned with Series A diligence expectations
Operational tooling for ongoing grant administration and vesting tracking

phases.name: Phase IV: Founder Shareholding Optimization
phases.framing_sentence: With the cap table cleaned up via Phases I–III, Accio Legal will analyze the resulting shareholding pattern and structure a path to restore combined founder holdings above the 60% threshold post-ESOP.
scope_bullets: Cap table analysis (pre and post the above three phases) and modeling of post-ESOP dilution
Advisory on target shareholding thresholds and dilution planning for Series A
Structuring of rights issue (if required) and selective participation to rebalance founder holdings
Drafting of associated resolutions and filings
outcome_bullets: Strengthened promoter control above the 60% combined threshold
Improved governance posture for incoming Series A investors

deliverables: Allotment compliance package — Board Resolution, allotment documentation, share certificates, PAS-3 filing
Buyback documentation — offer letter, board resolutions, and statutory filings under Section 68
ESOP plan, Letter of Grant template, board and shareholder resolutions, MGT-14 filing
ESOP grant, vesting, and exercise tracking spreadsheet
Founder control strategy note and rights issue documentation (if required)
Final equity structure report — diligence-ready summary for Series A investors

cost_table.service: Phase I — Regularization of Pending Share Allotment
Phase II — Buyback Structuring (Mr. Desai's Exit)

exclusions_note: Out-of-pocket expenses — government filing fees (including the MGT-14 and PAS-3 filings), stamp duty, and applicable taxes — are not included in the fees above and will be billed at actuals. Payment terms: 50% advance to commence work; balance due on delivery of each phase.
deferred_note: Secondary share transfer for Ms. Iyer's exit will be quoted separately when the Series A investor is identified, as the structure depends on the incoming investor's terms. Indicative range: ₹25,000 to ₹40,000.
next_steps: Project Confirmation — confirmation of acceptance taken over email
Engagement Agreement — sent across by Accio Legal
Work in Progress — group or email thread for communications and data gathering
Delivery — within timelines discussed on the call
